query:
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN jurisdiction LIKE '%"cn"%' AND jurisdiction LIKE '%"us"%' THEN 'cn+us'
    WHEN jurisdiction LIKE '%"us"%' AND jurisdiction LIKE '%"eu"%' THEN 'us+eu'
    WHEN jurisdiction LIKE '%"cn"%' THEN 'cn'
    WHEN jurisdiction LIKE '%"us"%' THEN 'us'
    WHEN jurisdiction LIKE '%"eu"%' THEN 'eu'
    WHEN jurisdiction LIKE '%"other"%' THEN 'other'
    ELSE 'empty'
  END as juris_group,
  COUNT(*) as count
FROM platforms
WHERE status = 'published'
GROUP BY juris_group
ORDER BY count DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2z1gdt7DDoC5w33.7125c4d7ce0b --database XAbbAijNEYDpVewPfSw4kC --execute SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN jurisdiction LIKE '%"cn"%' AND jurisdiction LIKE '%"us"%' THEN 'cn+us'
    WHEN jurisdiction LIKE '%"us"%' AND jurisdiction LIKE '%"eu"%' THEN 'us+eu'
    WHEN jurisdiction LIKE '%"cn"%' THEN 'cn'
    WHEN jurisdiction LIKE '%"us"%' THEN 'us'
    WHEN jurisdiction LIKE '%"eu"%' THEN 'eu'
    WHEN jurisdiction LIKE '%"other"%' THEN 'other'
    ELSE 'empty'
  END as juris_group,
  COUNT(*) as count
FROM platforms
WHERE status = 'published'
GROUP BY juris_group
ORDER BY count DESC;
